description: Detects catch blocks that swallow exceptions in Java. Simplified from Rust: flags all catch_clause nodes as potential swallowing sites. Cannot distinguish empty vs. printStackTrace-only vs. logging catches, or check deliberate-intent comments and @SuppressWarnings annotations.

flag.message: catch block detected -- verify it does not silently swallow the exception (exception swallowing detection simplified: body analysis not available in JSON DSL)
